title: AXSchedulerSlotDropEvent
description: Event emitted when an appointment is dropped onto a scheduler slot.

sections.title: Event Definition
sections.description: Shape of the scheduler slot drop event.

props.name: isSameSlotDrop
props.description: Whether the drop occurred on the same slot as the source.

props.name: sender
props.description: The component that sent the event. Inherited from NXEvent.
